selection_basis: V12 exploratory operating-envelope study; common interior low-load point across all qH/tau combinations
confirmation_definition: a nomination must pass the unchanged absolute gate independently in both disjoint 1200-replay batches

primary_success_rule.rationale: at least 90% confirmed certification over six physical scenarios and ten fresh search initializations

claim_boundary: does not replace or reinterpret the V11 0/120 result
does not claim certification at rho 0.70 or 0.90
trace arrival and token structure are trace-derived; privacy labels and replay construction remain synthetic
